--- title: "Global Language Diversity on Wikipedia" description: "A table showing the relationship between language speaker populations and Wikipedia article counts." author: "Carwil Bjork-James" date: "February 23, 2026" format: html: self-contained: true page-layout: full toc: true --- # Languages and Wikipedia Articles ![The largest Wikipedia editions by number of articles, 2024 (CC-0 [Arief Azazie Zain](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/User:Arief_Azazie_Zain "User:Arief Azazie Zain")) ](/images/wikipedia/List_of_Wikipedia_articles_by_language_-_March_2024.svg.png){alt="The largest Wikipedia editions by number of articles"} ::: {.cell} ::: ## Top 250 Languages by Number of Speakers Speaker estimates are L1 (first-language) counts from [LinguaMeta](https://github.com/cisnlp/linguameta), supplemented for a handful of languages where LinguaMeta lacks an estimate (sourced from Wikipedia).
